name: Aoife O'Connell
summary: Mid-level Technical Writer with 5 years of experience creating clear, concise, and accurate documentation for software products. Proven ability to translate complex technical information into user-friendly guides, API references, and tutorials. Seeking to leverage expertise in documentation tools and agile methodologies to contribute to a dynamic tech team.

experience.title: Technical Writer
experience.description: Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for SaaS products, including user manuals, online help systems, and release notes. Collaborate with engineering, product management, and QA teams to ensure technical accuracy and completeness. Utilize MadCap Flare and Confluence for content creation and management. Conduct user testing and gather feedback to improve documentation quality.

experience.title: Junior Technical Writer
experience.description: Assisted senior technical writers in creating and updating product documentation. Wrote and edited API reference guides and code examples. Managed documentation projects using JIRA and Git. Contributed to the development of style guides and templates.

experience.title: Documentation Specialist (Intern)
experience.description: Supported the documentation team by formatting documents, proofreading content, and organizing existing documentation repositories. Gained exposure to documentation tools and processes.

education.degree: Bachelor of Arts in English and Digital Media
